title: GetResponse vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: GetResponse vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between GetResponse and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. GetResponse is built for online course creators and webinar hosts, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_a: Online Course Creators And Webinar Hosts
comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on online course creators and webinar hosts
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. GetResponse wins for online course creators and webinar hosts, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or HubSpot?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
